item.title: The Golden Rule in Christian Dating
item.description: The significance society puts on outside appearances just fortifies the strain to show bogus certainty. This is simply increased with the fame of unscripted tv and web-based media. It has become the standard for our general public to seem one approach to every other person, as opposed to zeroing in on rolling out the improvements inside that will permit us to adjust our feeling of self... Feed: https://feeds.libsyn.com/585395/rss

item.title: Offcuts - Is Your Partner a Plastic Bag?
item.description:
Welcome to Offcuts, where we chat about whatever piqued our interest this week in a light, fun little package to send you off on your weekend!

We chat:

  • Laura's post-baby hormones are cooked
  • Conservatives are calling Alex Cooper's pregnancy a "gotcha moment" 
  • Kylie Jenner wore a ponytail to a basketball game and TikTok called it a revolutionary new hairstyle
  • The plastic bag... Feed: https://www.omnycontent.com/d/playlist/820f09cf-2ace-4180-a92d-aa4c0008f5fb/6f53e955-113c-412f-9b8e-b39e016ea999/e800ac8c-7114-4b38-8d45-b39e016eadb5/podcast.rss
